title: Pokemon Mystery Dungeon - Reactive Music Pack
description: A song pack for Reactive Music that adds soundtracks from various Pokemon Mystery Dungeon games.
body:
This is a songpack for the Reactive Music mod that replaces the soundtrack with songs from various Pokemon Mystery Dungeon games. The Reactive Music mod is REQUIRED for this, it will absolutely not work otherwise.

MUST BE UNZIPPED TO WORK! No clue why.
